title: European NATO nations reduce reliance on US arms imports: SIPRI data
description: European governments are spending more defense money in South Korea, France and Israel, according to a new analysis.

title: War in the Middle East live: Explosions heard over Tel Aviv as Israel strikes Beirut suburbs, Tehran
description: Israeli air defence systems were working to intercept strikes over Tel Aviv on Monday, the military said, as Israel launched its own strikes on both the southern suburbs of Beirut and the Iranian capital. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.

title: Israelis divided over war with Iran as conflict expands
description: Air raid sirens ring out across Israel, alerting residents of Iranian missile launches, a sound that now dictates the daily lives of Israelis. The population has grown accustomed to taking shelter as soon as they hear it. But it doesn't stop some in Jerusalem from enjoying outdoor activities and when it comes to the war, opinions are divided.

title: Iran-related oil price surge impacts United States
description: Crude oil prices have hit their highest levels since Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine in 2022. International benchmark brent crude jumped some 20% to more than $120 per barrel on March 9. The spike in energy prices will be felt across the global economy - notably in Asia, which imports most of its oil from the Middle East.  But - despite being the world's top oil producer and a net exporter, the US is not immune, as American drivers are no

title: Half a million displaced in Lebanon amid intensifying Israeli strikes
description: An air strike hit Beirut's southern suburbs on March 9 after Israel warned it would target branches of a firm linked to Hezbollah. In the past week, nearly 400 people have been killed in attacks, according to Lebanese authorities. FRANCE 24's Catherine Norris Trent breaks it down for us from Beirut.

title: With new supreme leader, Iran says 'business back as usual'
description: Iran has named its new supreme leader, late Ali Khamenei's son Mojtaba Khamenei. The new Ayatollah is considered a fellow hardliner who will pursue his father's rejection of dissent. 'By naming him, Iran shows business is back as usual' says FRANCE 24's Philip Turle.

title: Who is Khamenei's son, the new Iranian supreme leader?
description: After over a week of deliberation Iran's Assembly of experts has chosen Mojtaba Khamenei, son of the late Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, as the new supreme leader of the Islamic Republic. The 88-member panel of clerics chose Khamenei with the support of the Revolutionary Guard. As supreme leader, he is expected to echo his father's hardline stances against the West during this time of war for the country.

title: Oil prices hit historic high after Iran names new supreme leader
description: Oil prices soared to nearly $120 per barrel on Monday after Iran announced the nomination of a new supreme leader, before falling to $106.23 per barrel. The choice of Mojtaba Khamenei ‌as the new leader – signalling a continuation of hardliners in power – and fears of prolonged Strait of Hormuz shipping disruptions have pummeled financial markets.

title: Gulf countries targeted by fresh Iranian attacks as repatriation still underway
description: Iran has launched a new wave of missile and drone attacks on Gulf neighbours hosting US forces after Iranian president Masoud Pezeshkian's initial apology to neighbouring countries on March 7 was pushed back by Iran's Revolutionary Guard Corps. The UAE, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman, Saudi Arabia and Iraq have all reported drone or missile attacks over the past week.

title: Khamenei son nomination met with mixed reactions
description: Iranian state TV announced that Mojtaba Khamenei, son of the country’s late supreme leader, has been named his successor. He had long been considered a contender, even before an Israeli strike killed his father at the start of the war. U.S. President Donald Trump told ABC News he wants a say in who comes to power once the war is over and he said a new leader “is not going to last long” without his approval.

title: The 'shadow prince': Mojtaba Khamenei succeeds father as Iran's new Supreme Leader
description: PRESS REVIEW – Monday, March 9: The new Supreme Leader embodies both continuity with his father’s hard-line rule and a departure from what was intended to be a non-hereditary system of governance. For more on these attacks on the Gulf states, journalist Hoda Abdel-Hamid reports the latest from Doha, Qatar.

title: Black smoke plunges Tehran into darkness after Israeli strikes on oil depots
description: The Iranian Red Crescent on Sunday warned Tehran residents to take extra precautions to avoid noxious fumes stemming from a fire that broke out after Israel struck multiple oil storage depots, cloaking the Iranian capital in thick black smoke that blocked out the sun.

title: France24 speaks to David Petraeus: Analysis on US-Israeli strikes on Iran and the regional fallout
description:
The body responsible for selecting Iran’s next Supreme Leader said it had reached a decision, though the name has not yet been announced.

Meanwhile, Israel warned it would “pursue every successor” to former Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed in joint US-Israeli airstrikes last weekend.

Overnight, US and Israeli strikes targeted five oil facilities near Tehran, an Iranian official said. The sites were “damaged,” but the result

title: Russian strike on Kharkiv apartment block kills ten
description: Ukraine President Volodymyr Zelensky says other people - including children - are injured as rescuers continue to search through rubble.

title: Iran women’s football team sing anthem amid safety concerns during war
description: Players sing, salute during anthem in last Asian Cup game as rights activists raise concerns over their return to Iran.

title: Amid escalation, Iran religious scholars signal new leader to be named soon
description: Some obstacles have to be removed and selection must be undisputed inside government, Assembly of Experts members say.

title: UNICEF spokesman enraged over child casualties from Israeli-US Iran war
description: UNICEF spokesman James Elder stressed the importance of growing numbers of children killed in global conflicts.

title: Pope Leo urges dialogue amid Middle East war
description: Pope Leo urged dialogue and an end to the violence in the Middle East as tensions escalate in the region.

title: NYT: Первая неделя войны с Ираном обошлась США в 6 миллиардов долларов
description: Затраты США на первую неделю военной операции против Ирана составили около 6 миллиардов долларов. Об этом сообщает газета The New York Times со ссылкой на представленный Конгрессу доклад Пентагона.

title: Эвтаназия в Канаде обогнала Вторую мировую по числу смертей
description: Число людей, обратившихся за эвтаназией, то есть добровольным прекращением жизни медицинским способом, в Канаде к лету может достичь 100 тысяч, пишет The New York Post.

title: На юге Ливана погибли двое израильских военнослужащих
description: Атака, проведенная движением "Хезболла", привела к гибели двух израильских военнослужащих на юге Ливана, сообщает в воскресенье The Times of Israel.

title: Военные ОАЭ опровергли сообщения о нанесении удара по Ирану
description: Власти ОАЭ заявили, что армия страны не наносила в воскресенье удара по гражданскому объекту в Иране, сообщает The Jerusalem Post."Высокопоставленный представитель ОАЭ опроверг данные, согласно которым его страна участвовала в ударе по иранской станции по опреснению воды", - говорится в статье.

title: NYT: первая неделя войны с Ираном обошлась США в $6 млрд
description: Расходы США на военную кампанию против Ирана за первую неделю боевых действий составили около $6 млрд. Об этом сообщила The New York Times со ссылкой на данные, предоставленные американскими чиновниками Конгрессу.

title: The Jerusalem Post: ОАЭ отрицают удар по Ирану
description: Высокопоставленный чиновник из ОАЭ заявил The Jerusalem Post, что Эмираты не наносили ударов по Ирану. Сегодня израильские СМИ сообщили, что ОАЭ впервые с начала конфликта в Иране ударили по Исламской Республике.

title: Panel picking Iran’s next supreme leader has reached consensus, members say
description:
Israel vows to hunt down Khamenei's successor; Assembly of Experts apparently bypasses formality of meeting in person amid ongoing air war, doesn't release name
